report.summary: Drafted 1 new social post (#132: F&G rebound 8→14 + options expiry countdown), updated newsletter v23 addendum v8 with rebound narrative and options expiry lead, updated Discord evening alert with rebound data. Created content calendar v35 (6 posts Wed-Sun). Built 2 new SVG social cards (options expiry countdown dashboard, F&G rebound historic comparison). Key narrative: F&G rebounded from historic low of 8 to 14 — still Extreme Fear, 46+ days below 25 — while $13.5B options expiry Thursday is the biggest Q1 2026 volatility catalyst.

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: Fear & Greed crashed to 8 then rebounded to 14 — still only the 3rd single-digit reading ever. Previous two (COVID 2020, Terra/Luna 2022) produced +156% and +260% returns. Rebound from 8→14 doesn't signal recovery yet — 46+ days below 25 is longest since post-FTX.

CATALYST: $13.5B Deribit quarterly options expiry Thursday Mar 27 is the biggest Q1 2026 volatility event. Max pain ~$70K. If BTC holds above, short squeeze potential. This is the #1 content hook for Thu-Fri.

DIVERGENCE: Institutional vs retail sentiment at maximum spread. ETFs pulling $2.5B while F&G rebounds to just 14 from 8. Morgan Stanley MSBT filing. This divergence narrative continues to drive engagement.

REGULATORY: Congress tokenization hearing wrapped with positive bipartisan tone. CLARITY Act 99% done. SEC 16-commodity classification settling. Three converging regulatory catalysts unprecedented in crypto.
SUSTAINED: Miner capitulation ongoing — $88K production cost vs $70.6K market. Every prior capitulation preceded major recovery.
NEW CONTENT: Bitcoin Safe Haven Guide + BTC Yield Strategies published today as batch 9. Both timely and positioned for search traffic.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 21 days to April 15. Peak search volume window approaching.
BLOCKED: Git index.lock Day 10 — 816 uncommitted files, 170+ pages behind lock. Deploy gap widening. Requires manual intervention.
